channel.title: TheNextFreelancer Blog
channel.description: Expert insights on AI-powered freelancing, latest AI model updates, machine learning tutorials, and developer career advice.

item.title: Freelancing 101 in 2026: The AI-Powered Playbook for Every Experience Level
item.dc:creator: TheNextFreelancer
item.description: A practical 2026 freelancing guide for beginners, mid-level, and senior freelancers — with modern AI tools, workflows, and roadmaps for every niche.

item.title: How to Setup Your AI Project for Observability Using OTel and Arize Phoenix
item.dc:creator: TheNextFreelancer
item.description: Step-by-step guide to setting up observability for your AI project using OpenTelemetry (OTel) and Arize Phoenix. Monitor LLM traces, latency, and inputs/outputs.

item.title: Update on Llama Family of AI Models From Meta
item.dc:creator: TheNextFreelancer
item.description: Deep dive into Meta's Llama 4 AI models including Scout, Maverick, and Behemoth. Learn about the evolution from open-source to proprietary AI and what it means for freelancers.

item.title: Getting Started with AI-Powered Freelancing in 2026
item.dc:creator: TheNextFreelancer
item.description: A comprehensive roadmap for developers transitioning to AI-powered freelancing. Learn tools, pricing strategies, and how to position yourself for success.

item.title: Research Report on Frontier AI Models (Apr 2026)
item.dc:creator: TheNextFreelancer
item.description: Comprehensive analysis of GPT-5.2, Claude Sonnet 4.5, Gemini 3, and other frontier models. Performance benchmarks and use cases for freelancers.

item.title: Complete Machine Learning Course Index
item.dc:creator: TheNextFreelancer
item.description: Comprehensive curriculum covering supervised learning, neural networks, NLP, and deployment strategies for freelance developers.

item.title: Improving Accuracy of LLM Applications
item.dc:creator: TheNextFreelancer
item.description: Practical techniques for improving LLM outputs using prompt engineering, fine-tuning, RAG, and evaluation frameworks.

item.title: Python for AI: Complete Course Index
item.dc:creator: TheNextFreelancer
item.description: Master Python fundamentals and advanced concepts needed for AI and machine learning development. Includes hands-on projects and practical exercises.
